title: hypericum olympicum var. minus
intro: Hypericum olympicum var. minus, also known as dwarf St. John's Wort, is a subspecies of flowering plant within the St. John's Wort genus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, due to the presence of hyperforin and hypericin compounds. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and depression, improving sleep quality, and supporting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Hypericum olympicum var. minus can be infused in tea, made into tinctures, or applied topically as a salve or ointment to utilize its medicinal properties.
